title: Sweet Tahini Sauce
description: A simple and delicious sauce made with tahini, sweet ingredients, and a sour twist. Great for dipping veggies or using as a sauce for grilled meats.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine the cooked sweet potato, tahini, maple syrup, lemon juice, and garlic.
Blend on high speed for about 2 minutes, or until the sauce is smooth and creamy.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the sauce to a serving bowl and serve immediately.
You can store the sauce in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days.
